series_metadata.series_description: N.W. Ohio, Mansfield-Marion, Marietta, Youngstown, Wilmington-Chillicothe, Zanesville-Cambridge Control Regions--emission inven- tory reports used for the development of the 1971 SIP.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area 10 years, in EPA storage area 4 years, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
